video_title: LIVE: Squid Game Season 3 | Parade Livestream | Netflix
comment_text:
Just finished watching all the seasons!🎉 Huge thanks to every actor, actress, director, crew member & everyone behind the scenes for bringing Squid Game to life. You didn’t just create a series, you created a cultural phenomenon that introduced Korean traditions, childhood games, & raw human emotion to the entire world. I literally cried while watching the series😭

As a long-time fan of K-culture, my heart is full seeing the global recognition this series has received. I already miss the entire cast dearly (might just rewatch season one for the feels❤).
oh still missing Gong Yoo here 😢

I’ll be honest, I’m not too excited about the upcoming spin-off being filmed in the US. I simply prefer the magic that Korean actors & storytelling bring to the screen.
Still, I sincerely hope the new version will honour the soul of the original.

With love & admiration, 
a fan from Malaysia 🇲🇾❤️

video_title: LIVE: Squid Game Season 3 | Parade Livestream | Netflix
comment_text:
A Heartfelt Goodbye to Squid Game and Its Beloved Cast

Today, as we stand at the end of a global phenomenon, it's hard to believe Squid Game—a story that began with desperation, survival, and haunting humanity—has come to a close. A series that broke through language, culture, and class to unite millions of people around the world in shock, sorrow, and awe… has finally taken its last bow.

To say goodbye is not easy.

We laughed nervously at red light, green light. We clenched our hearts as marbles rolled between trembling hands. We wept when betrayal met friendship, and we silently screamed when trust was shattered again and again. Squid Game wasn't just a show—it was a mirror held up to our world, stripped of pretense, soaked in blood, desperation, and the unbearable price of hope.

But behind the masked guards, behind the twisted games, was a cast that gave this story its soul.

And to every single actor, crew member, writer, designer, director, and staff behind Squid Game—thank you. Thank you for pouring your soul into a project that dared to criticize capitalism, question morality, and remind us all that every human being is, at their core, fighting for dignity and survival.

Now, as we let go… we carry your voices with us. The friendships. The betrayals. The tears. The screams. The small moments—like sharing food, or helping a stranger. You didn’t just create a series—you created a legacy.

So this is our goodbye.

But not with a heavy heart. With gratitude.

Thank you, Squid Game, for changing television.
Thank you for forcing us to reflect.
And thank you, dear cast, for bleeding emotions into our lives.

Your story may be over—but the impact will echo for years to come.

We will never forget.
💔🦑😔🫰😭
